top_signals.title: Gold Wavers Near $4,000 as US-Iran Tensions Raise Inflation Risk
top_signals.summary: Gold wavered near $4,000 an ounce as traders weighed conflicting signals from the US and Iran ahead of fresh talks to end the war that’s fueled global inflationary pressures.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: ECB’s Wunsch Says Case for Another Rate Hike Not as Strong Now
top_signals.summary: The case for the European Central Bank to raise interest rates for a second time isn’t as clear as it was, according to Governing Council member Pierre Wunsch.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: Ukraine to use seized crypto from cybercrime group to buy war bonds
top_signals.summary: Ukraine's Asset Recovery and Management Agency (ARMA), which manages property seized in criminal proceedings, said more than $8.3 million in cryptocurrency had been transferred to its official digital wallet following a court order.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Japanese yen sinks to 40-year low, keeping intervention risks in focus
top_signals.summary: The Japanese yen weakened to its lowest level against the U.S. dollar since 1986 on Tuesday, keeping investors on alert for possible intervention from Japanese authorities.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: US Stocks Set to Finish Best Quarter in Six Years: Markets Wrap
top_signals.summary: The S&P 500 is on track to close out its best quarter in six years as the artificial intelligence trade appeared set for another day of outperformance.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Hackers now exploit critical Oracle E-Business flaw in attacks
top_signals.summary: Attackers have begun exploiting a critical vulnerability (CVE-2026-46817) in the Oracle E-Business Suite (EBS) financial application, according to threat intelligence company Defused. [...]
